titleStmt.title: The Greek Bible text of the Nestle-Aland, Novum Testamentum Graece, 28th revised edition, © 2012 Deutsche Bibelgesellschaft, Stuttgart.
The New Testament
The Epistle to the Romans
Romans

availability.p: The Novum Testamentum Graece text is protected by national and international copyright laws. Any use outside of the narrow limits provided by these copyright laws without the consent of the German Bible Society is prohibited and punishable. This applies particularly in cases of publication. It is also prohibited to distribute this text via the internet without written permission of the German Bible Society.

sourceDesc.p: Digital version of Nestle-Aland, Novum Testamentum Graece, 28th revised edition
